creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text: I couldn't reproduce with clang 12.0.1 in 14.0-CURRENT (main-n248773-d75b0870e542 as of 2021-08-18), so it's an issue with clang 11.0.1. It might still be interesting to fix for e.g. stable/11 which has clang 11. (Although this might only happen with assertions enabled.)
